product.name: Govee Outdoor Neon Rope Lights, 32.8ft RGBIC IP67 Waterproof Patio Decorations with 64 Scene Modes, Music Sync, Flexible LED Outdoor Lights, Neon Lights Work with Alexa, Google Assistant
features: Delicate Lighting Effects: The improved design of the Govee outdoor rope lights can better radiate colorful light effects. Measuring at a whopping 32.8 feet, the patio decorations can readily bent to fit any desired pattern for outdoor decorations.

Vivid RGBIC Lighting: Govee Outdoor lights uses RGBIC technology, allowing you to set separate light colors as you like. Choose from 64 scene modes and 16 million colors to enhance your outdoor atmosphere in yards, gardens, lawns, and more

Waterproof and Durable: This outdoor decor is IP67 waterproof with an IP67 control box and IP65 adapter. No matter the weather, you can enjoy year-round outdoor patio decorations for a fantastic ambiance

Simple Installation: Easily apply to walls with 30 mounting clips and 30 screws. It is recommended that clips be used with screws. You can also use the 8 angled ground sticks and 30 normal ground sticks to install the outdoor lights for any occasion.

Smart Voice Control: Manage your patio decor with simple voice commands via Alexa, Google Assistant, and Govee Home App. Enjoy access to more features such as Timer and DIY, helping you create a vibrant (Not Support 5G WiFi).

Sync with Music: This outdoor decorations can detect music and audio to match the lighting effects in real time to elevate your leisure time and outdoor parties. Bring a wonderful party atmosphere at any time. (Note: Do not soak product in water).
